steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the equation:
$$y=8(1.75)^0$$

steps.title: Apply the zero exponent rule
steps.content:
Any nonzero number raised to the $0$ power equals $1$:
$$(1.75)^0=1$$
Then
$$y=8\cdot1=8$$
The answer is 8.
